name: KSRTC Bus Stand
description: The main KSRTC bus stand with regular services to Hassan, Channarayapatna, Bengaluru and Mysuru. Enquire at the counter for the latest timings and platform numbers.

name: Town Auto Rickshaw Stand
route: Within town · Hill base · Nearby villages
description: Shared and private auto rickshaws for local trips within the town, to the hill base and to nearby villages. Agree on the fare before you start your ride.

name: Bahubali Taxi & Cabs
description: Sedans and SUVs on hire for outstation trips, airport transfers and full-day temple tours. Book in advance on call or WhatsApp for the best rates.

name: Shravana Two-Wheeler Rentals
description: Rent scooters and bikes by the hour or day to explore the town and surroundings at your own pace. Valid ID required; helmets provided.
